title: Potion Expire Sounds
description: A status effect utility mod with expiration warnings, combat-focused sounds, and a customizable HUD.
body:
## Description

A customizable status effect HUD and sound utility mod.

Warning you bevor your effect expires!

### Features
- Custom warning and expire sound settings
- Volume and pitch control for warning and expire sounds
- Separate combat sound management for Strength, Speed, and Fire Resistance
- Toggleable warning, countdown, and expire sounds
- Configurable warning threshold
- Fully Customizble Sounds (allows even complete custome recource pack sounds)
- With every Effect compatible (even with Moast Mod Effects)

### HUD
- Compact combat HUD mode
- Displays up to 10 effects in compact mode
- Option to hide infinite effects
- HUD editor for screen positioning
- A lot of customization

### General
- Effect filtering
- Selectable filter type
- Configurable config keybind
- ModMenu support
- Nearly every Aspect of the Mod is Configurable
- Works out of the Box

### Work in Progress
- HUD size settings
- HUD resize bug fixes
